verses.text: “Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Nisuahna lama om, tual sungnung kongpi pen nasep ni guk sung kikhakcip ding a, ahi zongin Sabbath ni leh Khadet ni-in kihong ding hi

Siampite in meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna a piak laitakun, gam uk ulianpa pen tual puanung lam panin inndei lianpi kongpi-ah pai-in kongpi khuamte gei-ah ding ding a, tua kongpi-ah bia-in tua khit ciangin pusuak kik ding hi. Nitak mateng tua kongpi kikhaklo ding hi
Sabbath ni leh Khadet nisimin mi khempeuh in zong tua kongpi mai-ah Topa bia-in kun ding uh hi
Gam uk ulianpa in Sabbath ni-in meihal biakna dingin paubaan'na a omlo tuuno guk leh tuutal khat pia ding hi

Tua ganhingte tawh a piakkhawm ding an tawh biakpiakna dingin zong, tuutal khat ciangin an bung khat kizuisak ding a, tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piaknop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna-ah sathau bing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi
Khadet ni ciangin paubaan'na a omlo bawngtal khat, tuuno guk, leh tuutal khat hi ding hi

Tuate tawh piakkhop dingin an tawh biakpiakna dingin bawngtal leh tuutalte khat ciangin an bung khat pai, leh tuunote tawh piakkhop ding pen ama piaknop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a piakna-ah sathau bing dim khat tawh kizuisak ding hi
Gam uk ulianpa in a kuanlamin a tot lampiteng mah a ciah ciangin tawnin, inndeipi kongpi mahah pusuak ding hi

“A kiseh pawi hunte-ah Topa a bia dingin a hong pai mite khempeuh pen a hong lutna kongpi zui-in kileh kiklo ding uh a, tangtakin paisuak ding uh hi. Leilu lam kongpi panin a lutte, leitaw lam kongpi-ah ciah ding uh a, leitaw lam kongpi panin a lutte, leilu lam kongpi-ah ciah ding uh hi
Gam uk ulianpa zong mihonte mah tawh lutin, amaute mah tawh pusuak khawm ding hi

Pawi nite leh a kiseh pawi hunte-ah an tawh biakna-in piak ding pen, bawngtal ahi a, tuutal ahi zongin khat ciangin an bung khat in zui ding a, tuunote tawh piakkhawm ding pen a mite' piaknop zahzah hi ding hi. An bung khat a kipiak ciangin sathau bing dim khat in zui ding hi

Gam uk ulianpa in ama utthu-in biakpiakna, meihal biakna ahi a, thunuama biakna ahi zongin khat peuhpeuh a piak ciangin, ama lutna dingin nisuahna lama om tual sungnung kongpi kihon'sak ding hi. Amah in Sabbath ni-in biakpiakna a bawl mah bangin pia ding hi. Amah a ciahkik khit ciangin a kongpi kikhak ding hi
“Gam uk ulianpa in meihal biakna-in piak dingin paubaan'na a omlo kum khat a pha tuuno khat, zingsang simin Topa ' tungah biakna-in pia ding hi. Hih pen nisimin a kipia ding ahi hi
Mangbuhnel lawh dim khat leh a meek khoppih ding sathau hai khat tawh, an tawh biakna-in zong, nisimin pia ding hi. Hih meihal biakpiakna ngeina pen a kip paisuak ding ahi hi
Tua bangin tuuno, mangbuhnel, leh sathau, zingsang simin Topa tungah a kipia ngitnget ding ahi hi
“Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: Gam uk ulianpa in ama neihsa leitang mun khat peuhpeuh, a tapate khat peuhpeuh tungah a piak leh, tua leitang a ngah a tapa in a luah gamh-in nei paisuak ding hi

Ahi zongin gam uk ulianpa in ama nasemte khat peuhpeuh tungah leitang a piak leh, suahtakna kum a tun' ciangin tua leitang pen a pia gam ukpa' neihsa suakkik ding hi. Bang bang hiam cih leh tua leitang pen ama neihsa hi a, amah leh a tapate bek in nei paisuak thei ding uh hi

Gam uk ulianpa in midangte' neihsa leitang laksak ngeilo ding hi. Ama tungah a kipia leitang sung panin a tapate khenkhia bek ding hi. Ka mite' leitang laksakin, bawlsialo ding hi, ci-in gen in,” hong ci hi

Tua ciangin a mipa in biakinntual sungnung leitaw lamah a om kongpi gei-a inndeite-ah hong paipih hi. Hih inndeite pen siampite' zat ding a siangtho inndeite ahi hi. Amah in tua inndeite' omna nitumna lampang mong hong kawk a

“Hih mun pen, siampite in mawhna leh khialhna hangin biakna-in a kipia sate a huanna mun, leh an tawh biakpiaknate a emna ding mun ahi hi. Hih pen, tual puanungah biakna sa leh ante paipihkha loin, tua a siangtho nate tawh tual puanunga om mite a lawhsakkhak lohna ding uh ahi hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin tual puanungah hong pusuahpih a, a tual kiu lite hong lak hi. Tua tual kiu lite' kiu-ah tualno khat ciat na om hi
Tua tualnote pi sawmgukgiat sau-in pi sawmligiat zai a, a vekin a golna kikim hi
Tua tualno lite a umna kawm dingin suang kiciang ciat a, tua a kawmte belin meikhuk a om hi
A mipa in, “Hihte pen, mite in biakna-in a piak sate, biakinnsung nasemte in a huanna anbuk ahi hi,” hong ci hi.
